testcase.name: test_me_has_promo_codes_and_tracking_link

failure.message: AssertionError: tracking_link missing from /me response assert 'tracking_link' in {'application': {'created_at': '2026-06-08T12:03:24.031158+00:00', 'email': 'yann.test-1780920203@example.com', 'full_name': 'Yann Kabongo', 'id': 24, ...}, 'email': 'yann.test-1780920203@example.com', 'profile': {'created_at': '2026-06-08T12:03:23.682189+00:00', 'email': 'yann.test-1780920203@example.com', 'email_verified': False, 'full_name': 'Yann Kabongo', ...}, 'promo_codes': [{'active': True, 'ambassador_id': '78dcfb4a-32af-4b29-8a85-dace5e585b63', 'code': 'YANNVSM10', 'created_at': '2026-06-08T13:19:38.64575+00:00', ...}], ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter2.py:76: in test_me_has_promo_codes_and_tracking_link assert "tracking_link" in data, "tracking_link missing from /me response" E AssertionError: tracking_link missing from /me response E assert 'tracking_link' in {'application': {'created_at': '2026-06-08T12:03:24.031158+00:00', 'email': 'yann.test-1780920203@example.com', 'full_name': 'Yann Kabongo', 'id': 24, ...}, 'email': 'yann.test-1780920203@example.com', 'profile': {'created_at': '2026-06-08T12:03:23.682189+00:00', 'email': 'yann.test-1780920203@example.com', 'email_verified': False, 'full_name': 'Yann Kabongo', ...}, 'promo_codes': [{'active': True, 'ambassador_id': '78dcfb4a-32af-4b29-8a85-dace5e585b63', 'code': 'YANNVSM10', 'created_at': '2026-06-08T13:19:38.64575+00:00', ...}], ...}
